'''Murtan Andes''' was the name of an [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] operative based on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Andes commanded [[system cell]] [[Tatooine/3]], and cultivated ties to the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] while on the planet. After members of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] operating on Tatooine fled their base, Andes was ordered to shut down the Tatooine/3 operation and head to the [[Al'Nasrl sector/Legends|Al'Nasrl sector]] by [[Pouquor Elegin]] of Imperial Intelligence's [[Sedition]] branch. Andes was to take any essential personnel along, but was refused permission to continue his association with Jabba the Hutt.
